# fleetdm_teams (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all FleetDM teams.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "fleetdm_teams" "all" {}

output "team_names" {
  value = [for team in data.fleetdm_teams.all.teams : team.name]
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all teams
data "fleetdm_teams" "all" {}

# Output all team names
output "all_team_names" {
  value = [for team in data.fleetdm_teams.all.teams : team.name]
}

# Find teams with hosts
output "teams_with_hosts" {
  value = [for team in data.fleetdm_teams.all.teams : team.name if team.host_count > 0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `teams` (Attributes List) The list of teams. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams))

<a id="nestedatt--teams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A description of the team.
- `host_count` (Number) The number of hosts in the team.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the team.
- `name` (String) The name of the team.
- `user_count` (Number) The number of users in the team.
